verbatim_text: For language type things, it could be the perplexity or the loss. And for other things, it could be pass a K accuracy. So you're doing some kind of classification kind of thing. And of course, you can do things like averaging the scores across two things. They're going to be on different scales. And so it doesn't make a lot of sense to do that. And some of the things that you care about that are maybe on very smaller scales, they might wash out if you do that.
